description: Media file analysis and metadata extraction (ships with FFmpeg)
Image manipulation and conversion (resize, crop, convert formats)
installGuidance: brew install imagemagick — or: apt install imagemagick

description: Sound processing — conversion, effects, recording, playback
installGuidance: brew install sox — or: apt install sox

description: Download video/audio from YouTube and 1000+ sites
installGuidance: brew install yt-dlp — or: pip install yt-dlp
